ι : Type u_1
R : Type u_2
M : Type u_3
N : Type u_4
inst✝⁵ : CommRing R
inst✝⁴ : AddCommGroup M
inst✝³ : Module R M
inst✝² : AddCommGroup N
inst✝¹ : Module R N
P : RootPairing ι R M N
inst✝ : CharZero R
⊢ Submodule.span R
      (Set.range
        ⇑({ toFun := List.get RootPairing.EmbeddedG2.allCocoeffs, inj' := ⋯ }.trans
            { toFun := fun x => Int.cast ∘ x, inj' := ⋯ })) =
    ⊤

proof:
refine eq_top_iff.mpr fun x _ ↦ ?_
    have : x ∈ span R {![0, 1], ![1, 0]} := by
      simp [Submodule.mem_span_pair]
      refine ⟨x 1, x 0, ?_⟩
      ext i
      fin_cases i <;> simp
    refine Submodule.span_mono (fun y hy ↦ ?_) this
    simp at hy
    obtain rfl | rfl := hy
    · exact ⟨5, by simp⟩
    · exact ⟨2, by simp⟩
